questions.question: What sculpture group is centered at the top of this image?
questions.rgb_answer: The sculpture group centered at the top of the image is the Quadriga, which is a chariot drawn by four horses abreast. It is a famous landmark located on the Brandenburg Gate in Berlin, Germany. The Quadriga is topped with a figure of Victoria, the Roman goddess of victory, holding a laurel wreath and a spear with a circular emblem at its tip.
